Currently selected process program(Set by AP)
1:Unformatted process programs; 2:Formatted process programs; 3:Both unformatted and formatted process programs (Set by AP)
Spooling accumulation message count. Spooling change Inactive set zero
(E40-PM) Used to indicate the number of jobs that can currently be created for the processing resource.
(E94-CJM) This is an ordered list of control jobs currently in the Queue. The first job in the list is the job at the head of the Queue.
(E94-CJM) Indicates number of jobs which the Queue can accept. This value cannot be negative. When it is zero it indicates that the queue is full
(E87-CMS) [CARRIERLOC-1] Carrier ID of the Carrier at the Carrier location
(E87-CMS) [CARRIERLOC-2] Carrier ID of the Carrier at the Carrier location
(E90-STS) [SUBSTLOC-1] Substrate ID of the substrate at the substrate location
(E90-STS) [SUBSTLOC-2] Substrate ID of the substrate at the substrate location
